reasoning: The market probability was 0.13 on July 24, 2025, and searches confirm that no Waymo skit occurred during the first half of the year (SNL Season 50). This means the resolution depends entirely on the remaining ~8-9 episodes of SNL Season 51 airing between October and December 2025. While Waymo has recently been in the news due to vandalism and protests in Los Angeles and San Francisco (June/July 2025), which could serve as material for a parody, the window of opportunity is small. Furthermore, SNL typically parodies topics with universal appeal; while Waymo is a flashpoint in certain cities, it may lack the national ubiquity that SNL often targets for full sketches. Given the ~90 sketches that will air in the fall, assigning a 10-15% chance of one featuring Waymo aligns well with the base rate for specific mid-sized tech companies and the market's July estimate of 13%.
